message:
test(readme): Series scalar reductions (sum/mean/min/max/std/var/median)

Series has 7 scalar reduction methods returning Result<Scalar,
FrameError>. They were exercised on Rolling/Expanding/Ewm/Resample
wrappers but Series-direct outputs were never asserted.

Adds readme_series_scalar_reductions — reachable via prelude alone —
on input [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]:

- sum    → 15
- mean   → 3.0
- min    → 1
- max    → 5
- median → 3.0
- var    → 2.5  (sample variance)
- std    → sqrt(2.5) ≈ 1.581

API note: Int64 input may yield Int64 (sum/min/max) or Float64
(mean/median/var/std) outputs. Test extracts numeric values via a
helper that accepts either variant.

Closes frankenpandas-fd90.62.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.60","title":"test(readme): DataFrame.head + .tail + Series.head + .tail with positive/negative N","description":"DataFrame and Series both expose .head(n) and .tail(n) — pandas-parity row-slice methods. Negative N selects all-but-last/first n rows. None are functionally exercised at the DataFrame/Series level.

Plan: assert head(2)/tail(2) on a 5-row frame plus head(-1)/tail(-1) negative semantics.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T17:49:38.712001073Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T17:57:36.358027430Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T17:57:36.355284125Z","close_reason":"completed: head/tail positive + negative N covered","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.60","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T17:49:38.712001073Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Algebraic results (cumsum=[1,3,6,10] for [1,2,3,4]) aren't pinned — a regression in any sequential op would not surface.

 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.7","title":"fp-io SQL table options helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table helpers that apply SqlReadOptions for table-name reads, including full-frame and chunksize variants.  {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.9","title":"test(readme): cover SqlInspector views/schemas/columns/indexes/FKs/UCs/PKs/reflect_table","description":"Sister to fd90.290 (which covered SqlInspector::tables only).

README line 148 documents SqlInspector as a SQLAlchemy.Inspector-shaped introspection (tables / views / schemas / columns / indexes / FKs / UCs / reflect_table / reflect_all_tables).

Currently only tables(schema) has integration coverage in readme_quick_example.rs (added by fd90.290). The other 8 documented methods are uncovered:
- views(schema)
- schemas()
- columns(table, schema)
- indexes(table, schema)
- foreign_keys(table, schema)
- unique_constraints(table, schema)
- primary_key_columns(table, schema)
- reflect_table(table, schema)

Plan: extend readme_quick_start_round_trip_through_sqlite (or sibling) to call each method against a small inspector-friendly schema and assert results match the schema.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:27:25.443018956Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T11:32:29.891910564Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T11:32:29.889312994Z","close_reason":"completed: 8 SqlInspector methods covered by readme_quick_start_round_trip_through_sqlite (commit 2d7d994)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.9","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:27:25.443018956Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
